slither_raw_findings.description: VulnerableGovernanceVault.emergencyMigrate(address,address,uint256) (src/sourcecode/obj/test2.sol#26-28) uses arbitrary from in transferFrom: token.transferFrom(from,to,amount) (src/sourcecode/obj/test2.sol#27)

Version constraint ^0.8.19 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.19 (src/sourcecode/obj/test2.sol#2)
